When to use:

Configure and fix .NET CI quality gates for SDK-style projects. Use when setting up or repairing dotnet build, test, analyzer warnings as errors, dotnet format, StyleCop or Roslyn analyzers, nullable reference types, Coverlet coverage, or Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions pipeline failures.
